task.title: Getting from Porto airport to the city center
task.shortdesc: Use the metro to go from the airport to the center of Porto easily

context.p: Porto airport, called Francisco Sá Carneiro airport, is connected to the city center by metro. It is usually one of the easiest options for first-time visitors.

step.cmd: Follow the signs inside the airport and look for the metro line E (purple color).

Buy an Andante ticket from the ticket machine. For your information, if the person is under 24 years old, they can buy a pass for 3 euros and take transportation for free whether it is in Porto or Vila Nova de Gaia.
Validate the ticket before entering the station.
Take the metro line toward Estádio do Dragão to go to the city centre.
Get off at a central station such as Trindade or Bolhão.

result.p: You arrive in the heart of the city and can continue to your accommodation on foot, by metro, or by uber.
